name: Rice with Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 2 large Flavor cubes, your choice of flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, melt the butter in the olive oil.
2. Lightly sauté the garlic until fragrant.
3. Chop the cabbage into fine pieces about 1 inch wide and 3 inches long.
4. Add all the cabbage to the pot with the garlic.
5. Mix well to coat the cabbage.
6. Stir in half a cup of water and partially cover the pot.
7. Cook until the cabbage is tender and lightly browned in spots.
8. Add the tomato sauce and mix well.
9. Add the rice and mix again.
10. In a separate pot, bring 6 cups of water to medium heat and dissolve the flavor cubes.
11. Gradually add the liquid to the rice pot, stirring after each addition until fully absorbed.
12. Continue cooking the rice until it is done.
13. Mix often to prevent sticking.
14. Season with salt and pepper, then serve hot topped with grated cheese.
This dish can be served as a main course, appetizer, or side dish.
